top_signals.title: Americans are 'entrenched' in financial stress amid debt and price pressures
top_signals.summary: Inflation and high debt levels continue cause financial anxiety for many Americans. Nonprofits can help with debt mangement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
